title: The Inside Story
writer: Ernest Lehman, Geza Herczeg, Mary Loos
actors: Marsha Hunt, William Lundigan, Charles Winninger
plot: A collection agent arrives in a small town with $1000 for a local farmer. Whilst waiting for the farmer to arrive the money is put in a safe at a hotel for safe keeping. However, it is removed by mistake and solves a number of fin...
